publishedAbstract: * `noobaa-core` pod is stuck in `Init:CrashLoopBackOff` state. * Init container in `noobaa-core` pod failing with the following error: ~~~ chgrp: changing group of '/mongo_data/mongo/cluster/shard1': Operation not permitted chmod: changing permissions of '/mongo_data/mongo/cluster/shard1': Operation not permitted ~~~
publishedTitle: PV's provisioned via ceph-rbd and cephfs are showing Access denied when written to
